assessment.note: Says the launch went well but she feels flatter than expected, which signals mild drop in engagement; also hints at an unexplained post-launch state worth a wellbeing probe next.

new_queue.label: Flatter than expected
new_queue.name: You said 'flatter than I expected' — what's underneath that?
new_queue.description: Drills into her exact phrase to locate whether this is post-launch recovery, disappointment, or something unresolved.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Next-quarter shape
new_queue.name: What do you expect to own next quarter?
new_queue.description: Gets her own view of upcoming ownership before any new project is introduced.

new_queue.label: Mentoring thread
new_queue.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week?
new_queue.description: Turns the stalled mentoring interest into a concrete shape and time cost.

new_queue.label: Launch leverage
new_queue.name: What do you want this launch to change for you over the next few months?
new_queue.description: Explores how she wants recognition and impact from the ship to translate into leverage.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given all that, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific near-term commitment without opening a new thread.
